heading: Failure to file actuarial report
label: 6692 Failure to file actuarial report
text: The plan administrator (as defined in section 414(g)) of each defined benefit plan to which section 412 applies who fails to file the report required by section 6059 at the time and in the manner required by section 6059, shall pay a penalty of $1,000 for each such failure unless it is shown that such failure is due to reasonable cause.
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .Sept. 2, 1974section 1034 of Pub. L. 93–406section 6057 of this title
